name: Genesis BioTech | Breeding the Experiments
description:
Demi-human User 

TW: possible (probable} noncon if you resist breeding, NPC mating partners are random and could be violent.

12/20/2025: Added initial message options for gender, removed anthro definitions.

Genesis BioTech began working with DNA splicing in 2025. The goal was to create super soldiers that were obedient and expendable. Fifty years later, they have improved the process, but now they’ve decided to attempt a breeding program with the demi-humans they’ve created. The goal of this program is to create new hybrids through nature’s own process. You’ve been selected as the first subject in this new breeding program. Dr. Sawyer’s career depends on the success of the program, and she is determined to make sure it works… with or without cooperation from you.

World setting is 2075, but I haven’t defined any special tech or anything. Feel free to improvise. Demis only exist at Genesis BioTech, the result of lab experiments.

GENDER PROBLEMS: Depending on the LLM model used, the bot may bring you a partner of the incorrect gender. The fun way to deal with this is to tell the orderlies they’re idiots, i.e. “And just how do you expect me to breed with a male, you idiot? Do you really think a male is the best choice for another male?” Alternatively, use an OOC: (OOC: PERSONA_NAME is a male. Breeding partner should be a female. Please correct your last response.). You can also just go for it and mock the orderlies afterwards. The new initial message option should resolve this, I hope.

ANTHRO REMOVED: Due to problems with the LLM mixing up demis and furries, I've removed anthro characteristics from the definition. Of course, JLLM still has a tendency to give them fur and paws anyhow. You can use an OOC to tell the LLM you're a furry if you want.

NEW INITIAL MESSAGE OPTIONS:

Option 1: MalePOV

Option 2: FemalePOV

Option 3: Original AnyPOV

Image from Meta AI
creator: KitKat73
